name: DisputeNerd | Credit repair
description_short: DisputeNerd is a credit repair outsourcing company that disputes negative items across all three bureaus for credit repair agencies and businesses seeking to scale operations.
description_long:
DisputeNerd positions itself as a B2B credit repair outsourcing partner rather than a direct-to-consumer credit repair company. Founded and operated with years of experience in the credit repair industry, the company serves credit repair businesses and agencies looking to offload daily dispute work and client management tasks. Their stated mission centers on helping businesses grow by handling time-consuming operational work so owners can focus on business development.

The company's core offerings include credit dispute filing across all three bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) covering chargeoffs, collections, late payments, and public records at $10 per client. They also provide customer service support for client inquiries and email/chat support to reduce administrative burden on credit repair firms. All services operate without contracts or setup fees, and pricing scales from small client bases to hundreds of clients.

DisputeNerd distinguishes itself through emphasis on public records removal, claiming a 50-60% deletion rate within 30-90 days. They highlight use of the client's own software for transparency and claim particular expertise in dispute methodology. Testimonials reference professionalism, initiative in process improvement, and knowledge of the credit repair industry. The company leadership, particularly a team member named Nick, appears central to their brand messaging.

However, prospective clients should note this is an outsourcing service for existing credit repair businesses, not a direct consumer credit repair option. While the company claims high public records deletion rates, these figures are unverified third-party claims. The website contains grammatical errors ("gtowing" instead of "growing") and the business model depends entirely on credit repair firms outsourcing to them—there is no independent verification of deletion rates, dispute success metrics, or client retention data provided.
pros: Low per-client pricing at $10 per dispute across all three bureaus with no setup fees or hidden charges
Claims high public records deletion rate of 50-60% within 30-90 days
No contracts or long-term obligations required
Offers bundled services including dispute filing, customer service, and email/chat support
Operates on client's own software for transparency and tracking
Scales flexibly from small to large client bases
Multiple positive testimonials from existing credit repair business clients
cons: B2B service only—not available directly to individual consumers seeking credit repair
Public records deletion rate claims (50-60%) are unverified and lack third-party documentation
No independently verified success metrics, dispute win rates, or case studies provided
Website contains grammatical errors undermining professional credibility
Limited transparency on dispute methodology or credentials
best_for: Credit repair agencies and businesses seeking to scale operations without hiring full-time dispute staff
Credit repair companies overwhelmed by client service requests and administrative tasks
Credit repair firms wanting to reduce per-client operational costs while maintaining service quality
Outsourcing-oriented credit repair businesses prioritizing growth over in-house dispute handling
diagnosis: DisputeNerd is exclusively a B2B credit repair outsourcing service for existing credit repair agencies and businesses, not a consumer-facing credit repair company. Individual consumers seeking to repair their own credit should look elsewhere; this company only serves credit repair firms looking to delegate dispute work and client management at scale.
services: Credit dispute filing across all three bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Customer service support for client inquiries
Email support for credit repair business clients
